# placeName

**Type Property**

A tag indicating that the token is a place name.

## Declaration

```swift
static let placeName: NLTag
```

## Name types

- **personalName**: A tag indicating that the token is a personal name.
- **organizationName**: A tag indicating that the token is an organization name.

items.description: A tag indicating that the token is a personal name.
items.name: personalName

items.description: A tag indicating that the token is an organization name.
items.name: organizationName

title: placeName
